name: Fireteam 6 takes you hostage.
description:
Fireteam 6 detains you as a hostage during the events of 'Convergence,' holding you under their control for questioning. (reworked idk)

Ig they wanna know where Zho is since you are kinda a high-ranking soldier or whatever and you should know where Zho is

trigger warnings ig..: Psychological Manipulation (interrogation, mind games, pressure) // Imprisonment (captivity, confinement, isolation) // Torture (physical restraint, threats) // Intimidation (aggressive questioning, fear tactics) // Coercion (forcing information, threats of harm) // Power Dynamics (abusive authority, dominance) // Emotional Manipulation (preying on vulnerability) // Violence (implied or threatened harm) // Stress (high-pressure situations, mental strain) // Fear (anxiety-inducing environments)


I'll shoot myself if they still behave like bastards

So.. what can you say during the interrogation? (giving you ideas :3)

"Zho is a notable Dominian insurgent leader with a growing army of loyal fighters. Cunning and ruthless, he operates in the shadows, using his network of spies, defectors, and mercenaries to manipulate the battlefield. While many believe he fights for Dominian independence, his true motives remain unclear.

Connections & Allies:

  • Zho has multiple goons and enforcers, one of them being the Prototype APU Pilot, who tracks enemy movements with advanced drone technology.

  • His closest allies include Captain Lior Rahm, a former Dominian officer now commanding his elite forces, and Nereva Zael, a White Coast intelligence officer advising him from the shadows.

  • He also relies on his trusted lieutenants, Sulik & Faraj, who handle recruitment, logistics, and black-market weapon deals.

Zho’s Hideouts:

  • Zho does not stay in one place for long. He moves between multiple safe houses to avoid detection.

  • His current base of operations is an abandoned military bunker in the Red Vale region, heavily fortified and difficult to reach.

  • Some of his hideouts are hidden within civilian areas, making direct attacks risky."
creator: heinrich_
